privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated RocketChat data injected via setup scripts. It was verified that the target project 'Phoenix Migration' requires the creation of the main channel 'phoenix-migration' and three sub-channels ('phoenix-frontend', 'phoenix-backend', 'phoenix-devops'). Furthermore, the six explicitly expected team members ('fe.lead', 'be.lead', 'qa.tester', 'ux.designer', 'pm.coordinator', 'devops.lead') perfectly match the API user creation calls in setup_task.sh and the strict evaluation criteria in verifier.py.
